name: energybae-solar-calculator
description: MSEDCL electricity bill -> filled Energybae solar Excel template via Gemini extraction.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
